title: Letter Stories - Menu Configuration
description: Navigation menu structure for main header navigation and footer links. Used in: Header.js (main menu), Footer.js (footer menu).

main.description: Primary navigation menu items displayed in the site header. Used in Header.js (renders as top navigation bar links).

name.description: Display label for the navigation link. Used in Header.js as the visible menu text.

url.description: URL path for the navigation link. Used in Header.js as the href attribute.

hasChildren.description: Indicates if this menu item has dropdown children. Used in Header.js to conditionally render a dropdown submenu.

children.description: Dropdown submenu items under this parent menu entry. Used in Header.js to render nested dropdown links.

name.description: Display label for the child navigation link.

url.description: URL path for the child navigation link.

footer.description: Navigation links displayed in the site footer. Used in Footer.js (renders as footer link list).

name.description: Display label for the footer navigation link. Used in Footer.js as visible text.

url.description: URL path for the footer navigation link. Used in Footer.js as the href attribute.
